steps.title: Translate the total
steps.content:
No more than $268$ total shrubs means the sum of hollies and weigelas is at most $268$:
$$h+w\le 268$$

steps.title: Translate the holly limit
steps.content:
The number of hollies is at most three times the number of weigelas, so hollies cannot exceed $3w$:
$$h\le 3w$$

steps.title: Match both inequalities
steps.content:
The system must include both conditions:
$$h+w\le 268$$
$$h\le 3w$$
The answer is A.
